51272.author: ghyls
51272.body:
#### PR description:
Backport of #50889.

This backport is being opened so that the changes introduced by #50889 can be included in the MPI-related tests on the Run 3 HLT setup.

#### PR validation:
Unit tests pass
51272.title: [17_0_X] Prevent the MPI modules from throwing upon race conditions or hanging at the end of a run

51314.author: kpedro88
51314.title: Fix incorrect loop and memory leak in Phase 2 SIM code [17_0_X]

51322.author: fwyzard
51322.body:
#### PR description:

Extend the `convertToRaw` to support reading streamer files (.dat), as well as edm files (.root).

#### PR validation:

Tested converting streamer files from run 404926 to .raw format, and running the heavy ions HLT menu on the result.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport #51321 and #51349 to 17.0.x for Run 3 developments.
51322.title: [17.0] Extend convertToRaw to support streamer files
